query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, anGameId, gameNumber, result, odds, createdAt
FROM tracked_bets
WHERE awayTeam = 'HOU' AND homeTeam = 'BAL'
ORDER BY gameDate DESC, anGameId ASC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, anGameId, gameNumber, result, odds, createdAt
FROM tracked_bets
WHERE awayTeam = 'HOU' AND homeTeam = 'BAL'
ORDER BY gameDate DESC, anGameId ASC
LIMIT 20;
